Package global.thalion.ttio.transport

Class TransportWriter

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.transport.TransportWriter
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class TransportWriter extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Serialises an SpectralDataset as a transport byte stream.

Cross-language equivalents: Python ttio.transport.codec.TransportWriter, Objective-C TTIOTransportWriter.

    • emitRawPacket

      public void emitRawPacket(PacketType type, int flags, int datasetId, long auSequence, byte[] payload) throws IOException
      Emit a packet with arbitrary flag bits. Used by EncryptedTransport so it can set FLAG_ENCRYPTED / FLAG_ENCRYPTED_HEADER on AUs.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • writeGenomicRun

      public void writeGenomicRun(int datasetId, String name, GenomicRun run) throws IOException
      M89.2: Write a single GenomicRun as a stream segment.

      Used by callers that drive emission manually (multiplexed streams, M89.4). The dataset header + AUs + end-of-dataset are emitted; the caller is responsible for stream framing (writeStreamHeader / writeEndOfStream).

      (M89.2)
      Throws:
      IOException
